sentences.arabic: يُعَدُّ الْمَنْسَفُ الْأُكْلَةَ الشَّعْبِيَّةَ الْأَكْثَرَ شُهْرَةً فِي بَعْضِ الدُّوَلِ الْعَرَبِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Mansaf je najpoznatije tradicionalno jelo u nekim arapskim zemljama.
sentences.translationEn: Mansaf is the most famous traditional dish in some Arab countries.

sentences.arabic: يَتَكَوَّنُ هَذَا الطَّبَقُ مِنَ اللَّحْمِ وَالْأُرْزِ وَلَبَنِ الْجَمِيدِ.
sentences.translation: Ovo jelo se sastoji od mesa, riže i jameed jogurta.
sentences.translationEn: This dish consists of meat, rice, and jameed yogurt.

sentences.arabic: يَجْتَمِعُ أَفْرَادُ الْعَائِلَةِ حَوْلَ مَائِدَةٍ وَاحِدَةٍ لِتَنَاوُلِهِ فِي الْمُنَاسَبَاتِ.
sentences.translation: Članovi porodice se okupljaju oko jedne trpeze kako bi ga jeli u posebnim prilikama.
sentences.translationEn: Family members gather around one table to eat it on special occasions.

sentences.arabic: يُوضَعُ خُبْزُ الشِّرَاكِ تَحْتَ الْأُرْزِ لِيَمْتَصَّ النَّكْهَةَ اللَّذِيذَةَ.
sentences.translation: Šrak hljeb se stavlja ispod riže kako bi upio ukusan miris.
sentences.translationEn: Shrak bread is placed under the rice to absorb the delicious flavor.

sentences.arabic: يُحِبُّ النَّاسُ هَذِهِ الْوَجْبَةَ لِأَنَّهَا تَرْمِزُ إِلَى الْكَرَمِ.
sentences.translation: Ljudi vole ovaj obrok jer simbolizira velikodušnost.
sentences.translationEn: People love this meal because it symbolizes generosity.
